headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 11, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 2 RBI. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a narrow victory, while the Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, including Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026. Other players affected by injuries include Atlanta Braves center fielder Eli White, Detroit Tigers right fielder Kerry Carpenter, Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Edwin Díaz, Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart, San Francisco Giants right-handed pitcher Logan Webb, and Milwaukee Brewers left fielder Brandon Lockridge.

The San Francisco Giants made a move on May 9, 2026, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 2 RBI. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Close Contest**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a narrow victory. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after 6.1 innings of scoreless relief. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Addison Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire Lefty Pitcher in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants made a move on May 9, 2026, acquiring LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey.
